title: Meowl!
description: Adds a new soul to your strange world :3
body:
This little resoursepack replaces ur parrots with Meowl! 
Meowl is very cute, but shy! Thier soul a new, they just come to this strange world, and they need your help to learn about give and take!

![Dumb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b006be5c47d5ea978c8f37fb3afa0997d261a4df_0.webp)

Important!! This pack required Optifine or Entity Texture Features and Entity Model Features to work!!
